label: watch

claimProbes.statement: HER3/ERBB3 has weak-to-negligible intrinsic kinase activity and signals mainly by heterodimerizing with other ERBB receptors (notably HER2), coupling strongly to PI3K/AKT.
HER3 is a potent stand-alone receptor tyrosine kinase that drives tumor growth autonomously without dimerizing with other ERBB members.
claimProbes.note: Contradicts HER3 impaired catalytic activity / obligate heterodimerization.

rationale: Validated biology (kinase-impaired, obligate heterodimer, PI3K-coupled) but no HER3-selective approval yet; ADC data maturing.
